title: How Teams of Speedrunners Broke Zofia
description:
Four teams of speedrunners competing to glitch hunt, route and run a game none of them have ever played before.

What speed tech will each team be able to find? Who will set the fastest time and win this Run Invalid season?

title: Borderlands 4 Co-Op at ESA Winter 26
description:
Vahisht, Havrd and a 6 hour estimate.

Will Steam maintenance stop them from finishing a run before the speedtech gets patched out?
